===Pokémon Adventures===
[[File:Aaron Adventures.png|thumb|200px|Aaron in Pokémon Adventures]]
Aaron, along with Lucian and Bertha, appeared during the {{MangaArc|Platinum}}, having been enlisted by the [[Pokémon Association]] to decipher [[Charon]]'s notebook that was stolen by {{adv|Diamond}}'s {{p|Lickilicky}}, [[Kit]]. Together, they figured out the hidden information inside the book and gave it to Diamond and {{adv|Pearl}} so they can use it to stop Charon from capturing the [[Legendary Pokémon]] of Sinnoh.
